name: Creole Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg and egg yolk well in a food processor.
2. With the machine running, add the peanut oil in a thin, steady stream, processing until thickened.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (white vinegar, liquid hot pepper sauce, kosher salt, and white pepper) and process until well blended.
4. Cover and chill for 1-48 hours.
5. Serve slightly chilled.
